hero.name: Santiago Ariel
hero.description: I transform ideas into scalable technology solutions specialized in CI/CD, automation and full stack development.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Learn more about my professional journey and passion for technology
about.story_p1: I am Santiago Ariel Mansfeld, a Computer Engineering student at Universidad Nacional de La Matanza with over 3 years of professional experience in software development, IT infrastructure administration and DevOps practices.
about.story_p2: My focus is on continuous integration, solving complex problems and improving technological infrastructures. I have worked from aerospace development to e-commerce, always seeking innovative solutions.
about.story_p3: I currently work as a DevOps Analyst at Accusys Technology, where I manage CI/CD processes, optimize infrastructure and develop automation tools with React and NodeJS.
about.accusys_description: CI/CD management, infrastructure optimization and development of tools with React and NodeJS. Working with Jenkins, Ansible, SonarQube and Git.
about.rdigital_title: Full Stack Developer & DevOps Engineer - RDigital
about.rdigital_description: E-commerce development with NodeJS, React, NestJS and PostgreSQL. Deployment with Docker-Compose and PM2 on Linux servers. CI/CD implementation with GitHub Actions. Infrastructure on Hostinger and AWS.
about.municipal_title: IT Admin - Municipalidad Lomas de Zamora
about.municipal_description: Administration of Windows/Linux servers, VPNs, virtualizers and security systems.
about.unlam_description: Development of aerospace systems, integration with Satnogs API and NASA OPENMCT.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey in software development, DevOps and IT Infrastructure
experience.accusys_period: May 2024 - Present • Buenos Aires, Argentina • Hybrid
experience.accusys_description: As a DevOps SSR I manage Continuous Integration (CI) and continuous delivery (CD) processes, optimizing infrastructure and automating deployments. I also develop tools for artifact management and CI/CD repository handling using React and NodeJS.
experience.rdigital_description: Complete development of B2B and B2C e-commerces from conception to deployment. Implemented scalable architectures with NodeJS, React, NestJS and PostgreSQL. Infrastructure management with Docker-Compose, PM2 and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.
experience.municipal_description: Comprehensive municipal IT infrastructure administration. Management of Windows/Linux servers, corporate VPN implementation, VMware virtualizer administration and perimeter security systems.
experience.unlam_company: Universidad Nacional de La Matanza - GIDSA
experience.unlam_period: Mar. 2022 - Mar. 2024 • Buenos Aires, Argentina • Hybrid
experience.unlam_description: Development of telemetry and control systems for aerospace applications. Integration with Satnogs and NASA OPENMCT APIs for satellite monitoring. Implementation of space communication protocols.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I master to create innovative solutions
skills.devops_description: Automation, CI/CD and infrastructure as code

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of my most important works in DevOps, web development and systems

cicd.title: Automated CI/CD System
cicd.desc: Complete CI/CD pipeline implementation with Jenkins, Ansible and SonarQube for private enterprise infrastructure. Deployment automation, artifact management and code quality monitoring in corporate environment.

easysync.title: EasySync - Release Management
easysync.desc: Complete web application for automated artifact and release management. Publication, distribution and version notification system with modern React interface and robust Node.js backend.

dealshop.title: E-commerce Platform
dealshop.desc: Development and maintenance of e-commerce platform with React, NodeJS, NestJS and PostgreSQL. CI/CD implementation with Docker-Compose and deployment on Hostinger with complete documentation.

marketfull.title: E-commerce Platform
marketfull.desc: Multi-vendor marketplace developed with microservices architecture. Real-time inventory management system, integrated payment gateway and advanced admin panel with React and Node.js.

infrastructure.title: IT Infrastructure Management
infrastructure.desc: Complete government infrastructure administration: Windows/Linux servers, VPNs, virtualization systems, domain controllers and monitoring systems in private network of Municipality of Lomas de Zamora.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.desc: Modern web portfolio with Tailwind CSS, dark mode, advanced animations and SEO optimization. Responsive design and optimized performance.

smartstore.title: Smart Store
smartstore.desc: Smart online store with real-time inventory management. Products are automatically updated from Google Sheets, offering a smooth and modern shopping experience.

research.about_desc: Research project developed at GIDSA (Aerospace Systems Research and Development Group) at the National University of La Matanza, focused on real-time integration of satellite communication systems using modern web technologies.

achievements.stress_tests: Completed stress tests on backend technology

research.impact_desc: The UGS project represents a significant advance in Argentina's capacity for real-time satellite monitoring and control. My contribution focused on backend development, implementation of bidirectional WebSocket communication, and system performance optimization to handle multiple simultaneous connections.

projects.dealshop_description: Complete B2B and B2C e-commerce platform with scalable architecture, real-time inventory management and integrated payment gateway.
projects.satnogs_description: Satellite telemetry system for monitoring and control of space missions, integrated with NASA and SatNogs Network APIs.
projects.devops_description: Automation tools suite for CI/CD, infrastructure monitoring and enterprise deployment management.
projects.portfolio_description: Personal portfolio with internationalization system, dark mode and responsive design. Optimized for SEO and performance.
